overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a female character with a glowing headband and bright pink boots navigating Night City during sunset. The character transitions from waiting on a sidewalk, crossing an intersection, walking through a neon-lit underpass, and stopping at a street corner while surrounded by futuristic architecture and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with crosswalk and elevated highway

events.description: character stops walking and stands still observing the surroundings and other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: standing on the sidewalk near a yellow-striped crosswalk, observing the surroundings and waiting for the right moment to cross

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing standing near the crosswalk waiting to cross

entered.detail: large curved metallic overpass with support beams spanning across the street above
glowing holographic traffic sign suspended over the street displaying parking restrictions
bold yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
futuristic curved glass structure with green tinted windows and metallic frames
large illuminated billboard displaying colorful pink and blue graphics

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a concrete sidewalk at a street corner during golden hour, partially shaded by an elevated highway structure. Neon signs and digital billboards illuminate the area while other pedestrians wait nearby. The scene captures the cyberpunk aesthetic of Night City with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

events.description: character begins walking forward to cross the street with other pedestrians
character walks across the yellow-striped crosswalk in the middle of the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide yellow-striped crosswalk surrounded by other pedestrians moving in the same direction

notable_agents.action: futuristic dark-colored car driving through the intersection in the background

entered.detail: tall building with large illuminated signage reading 'NO ARCHI' on the facade
painted text on the road surface reading 'NIGHT CITY' in large letters

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the crosswalk and walks across the open intersection bathed in golden hour sunlight. The 'NO ARCHI' building dominates the skyline ahead while other pedestrians cross alongside. Vehicles pass in the background as the character moves from the sidewalk onto the asphalt crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway with vehicle traffic

events.description: character enters the covered area under the overpass where lighting shifts to artificial neon
character waits near the curb as a green futuristic car drives past on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the overpass, passing concrete pillars and parked cars while navigating the dimly lit corridor

notable_agents.action: green futuristic sedan with glowing accents driving along the road under the overpass

entered.detail: underside of the highway structure with exposed beams, panels, and industrial texture
long fluorescent light strips running along the ceiling illuminating the underpass
thick concrete columns holding up the highway structure above the sidewalk
sleek black and green vehicles parked along the curb with reflective surfaces

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit underpass beneath the elevated highway, where the environment shifts to artificial neon lighting. Concrete support pillars line the left side while futuristic cars are parked along the right. The character walks through this sheltered corridor as vehicles drive past on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner at intersection with neon-lit buildings

events.description: character exits the underpass back into the open intersection area with sunset lighting
character stops at the street corner and stands still observing traffic and pedestrians

agents.ego_description: standing at the street corner near the crosswalk, watching vehicles and pedestrians pass by in the golden hour light

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking past the character on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall building with large illuminated signage visible again as character exits the underpass
yellow striped crosswalk markings at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the underpass back into the open street corner bathed in warm sunset light. The 'NO ARCHI' building is visible again in the distance while the character stands near the crosswalk observing the flow of pedestrians and traffic. The scene returns to the mixed lighting of natural sunset and neon signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling urban intersection that transitions from open golden hour sunlight into a neon-lit underpass before returning to the warm glow of sunset. It begins on a concrete sidewalk shaded by an elevated highway, where the character waits among pedestrians beneath glowing digital billboards. As she steps onto the crosswalk, the scene opens into a wide intersection bathed in natural light with the NO ARCHI building dominating the skyline. The environment then shifts abruptly into a dimly lit underpass, where the sunlight is replaced by artificial neon hues reflecting off concrete pillars and parked futuristic cars. Finally, the camera follows her as she emerges from the sheltered corridor back into the open street, returning to the mixed lighting of the sunset and city signage.
